channel.title: Hosted Private Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [EU/CA][Hosted Private Cloud] - Managed VMware vSphere Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 20, 07:00 UTC  -  Jul 24, 17:00 UTC

Jun 25, 18:01 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

Start time : 20/07/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 24/07/2026 17:00 UTC
Service impact : Hosts will be put in maintenance mode during the operation and a vMotion will be performed if it has virtual machines in it.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

An individual communication will be done to inform customers.
Customers can reschedule the operation through the manager.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [EU/CA][Hosted Private Cloud] - Managed VMware vSphere Maintenance Notification
item.description:

Service impact : Hosts will be put in maintenance mode during the operation and a vMotion will be performed if it has virtual machines in it.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

An individual communication will be done to inform customers.
Customers can reschedule the operation through the manager.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [EU/CA][Hosted Private Cloud] - Managed VMware vSphere Maintenance Notification

THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 1, 07:00 - 16:00 UTC

Jun 30, 12:37 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

Start time : 01/07/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 01/07/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : None
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Managed VMware vSphere offer for NSX-T.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX2A][Managed VMware vSphere] - Cluster8339 incident notification
item.description:
Jun 30, 12:03 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering has been resolved.

Start time : 30/06/2026 09:00 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 09:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 30, 09:43 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident.
We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Hosted Private Cloud offer on the Cluster8339.

Here are some supplementary details :
Start time : 30/06/2026 09:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster8339 is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their data located in the specified cluster.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [EU/CA][Hosted Private Cloud] - Managed VMware vSphere maintenance notification
item.description:
Jun 29, 09:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 23, 17:51 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

Start time : 29/06/2026 09:00 UTC
End time : 03/07/2026 17:00 UTC
Service impact : Hosts will be put in maintenance mode during the operation and a vMotion will be performed if it has virtual machines in it.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

An individual communication will be done to inform customers.
Customers can reschedule the operation through the manager.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX8][Managed VMware vSphere] - Rack R820L18 incident notification
item.description:
Jun 26, 12:10 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering has been resolved.

Start time : 26/06/2026 08:20 UTC
End time : 26/06/2026 12:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 26, 11:35 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 26/06/2026 08:20 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some hosts are temporarily unavailable in Rack R820L18.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their hosts located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX2C][Managed VMware vSphere] - Some Hosts Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 26, 02:25 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering has been resolved.

Start time : 25/06/2026 23:09 UTC
End time : 26/06/2026 02:11 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 26, 01:03 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering on the specific RBX2C region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 25/06/2026 23:09 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some hosts are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their hosts located on the specified region.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 25, 23:54 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the RBX2C region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 25/06/2026 23:09 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some hosts are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their hosts located on the specified region.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX2a][VMware Private Cloud] - Cluster 7420 Incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 24, 08:29 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Public VMware Cloud Foundation offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/06/2026 02:10 UTC
End time : 21/06/2026 02:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster7420 was temporarily unreachable.
Customers Impact : Customers were unable to access their datastores in Cluster7420.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

Jun 24, 07:35 UTC
Investigating - We had an incident on Public VMware Cloud Foundation offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/06/2026 02:10 UTC
End time : 21/06/2026 02:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Cluster7420 was temporarily unreachable.
Customers Impact : Customers were unable to access their datastores in Cluster7420.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Managed VMware vSphere offer.

An individual communication will be done to inform customers.

item.title: [LIM1][Managed VMware vSphere] - Racks L106B17/L106B18 incident notification
item.description:
Jun 18, 14:40 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering has been resolved.

Start time : 18/06/2026 13:00 UTC
End time : 18/06/2026 14:15 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 18, 13:21 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering in the racks L106B17 and L106B18.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 18/06/2026 13:00 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some hosts in the racks L106B17 and L106B18 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their hosts located on the specified racks.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX2a][Managed VMware vSphere] - Cluster8335/8342/8343/8337 incident notification
item.description:
Jun 16, 10:01 UTC
Resolved - We would like to inform you that an incident occurred on our Hosted Private Cloud offer.
This incident has now been resolved.

List of concerned clusters :
Cluster8335
Cluster8342
Cluster8343
Cluster8337

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 16/06/2026 08:37 UTC
End time : 16/06/2026 09:50 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The specified clusters were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their data located in the specified clusters.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [RBX1A/SBG2A][Managed vSphere] - Storage maintenance notification
item.description:
Jun 9, 21:04 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 9, 06:30 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 12, 23:52 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Managed vSphere offer in RBX1A and SBG2A regions.

Start time : 09/06/2026 06:30 UTC
End time : 09/06/2026 21:00 UTC
Service impact : There will be no impact on the vSphere UI, data availability, or virtual machines during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we are rolling out an update for multiple storage servers.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM3][Managed VMware vSphere] - Rack LIM0302A05A incident notification
item.description:
Jun 1, 20:50 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Managed VMware vSphere offer on rack LIM0302A05A which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 28/05/2026 21:57 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 22:53 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Hosts in rack LIM0302A05A were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access and use their hosts located in rack LIM0302A05A.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [GRA4][Infrastructure] - Rack GRA0402B03C maintenance notification
item.description:
May 26, 13:58 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 26, 06:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 25, 09:42 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 26/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 26/05/2026 12:00 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX/SBG/BHS/ERI][Network] - Network Maintenance Notification

End time : 15/05/2026 20:00 UTC

Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we are rolling out an upgrade for vSphere offer.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX8][Managed VMware vSphere] - Rack R820L17 Incident Notification
item.description:
May 12, 20:04 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering has been resolved.

Start time : 12/05/2026 13:30 UTC
End time : 12/05/2026 20:03 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 12, 13:59 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Managed VMware vSphere offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in Rack R820L17.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 12/05/2026 13:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some hosts are temporarily unavailable in Rack R820L17.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their hosts located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
